deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.description: Configuring {integration_title} via YAML is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. While importing your configuration, a connection error occurred. Please correct your YAML configuration and restart Home Assistant, or remove the {domain} key from your configuration and configure the integration via the UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.title: [%key:component::homeassistant::issues::deprecated_yaml::title%]

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_invalid_aut.description: Configuring {integration_title} via YAML is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. While importing your configuration, invalid authentication details were found. Please correct your YAML configuration and restart Home Assistant, or remove the {domain} key from your configuration and configure the integration via the UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_invalid_aut.title: [%key:component::homeassistant::issues::deprecated_yaml::title%]

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_unknown.description: Configuring {integration_title} via YAML is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. While importing your configuration, an unexpected exception occurred. Please correct your YAML configuration and restart Home Assistant, or remove the {domain} key from your configuration and configure the integration via the UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_unknown.title: [%key:component::homeassistant::issues::deprecated_yaml::title%]
